# Pull Request

## Related Issue
Closes #

## Summary
Provide a brief overview of the problem solved and the implementation approach taken.

## Changes Made
- List component or file modifications.
- Detail any new modules or dependencies introduced.
- Outline any breaking API changes or configuration changes.

## Testing
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

### Automated Tests
- Run command: `python -m pytest <test_file>` or similar.
- State any new test suites added.

### Manual Verification
- Describe the visual, responsive, or interactive checks performed on the local environment.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings (if UI/UX changed)
Add links, embedded images, or gifs demonstrating the visual enhancements.

## Impact
Explain why this contribution improves the reliability, safety, or overall developer experience of AgentWatch.

## Checklist
- [x] Code follows the repository's styling guidelines.
- [x] Tested locally and confirmed all tests pass.
- [x] Zero unrelated changes or files included.
- [x] Documentation updated (if applicable).
- [x] Responsive layout and accessibility validated (if UI changes made).
